name: Plum Creek Timber Company
description: Plum Creek Timber Company, Inc. was a prominent American timberland owner and manager, as well as a forest products, mineral extraction, and property development company. Headquartered in Seattle, Washington, the company managed millions of acres of timberlands across the United States. It operated through various segments, including Northern and Southern resources, focusing on sustainable forest management and land development. In 2016, Plum Creek merged with Weyerhaeuser Company in an $8.4 billion transaction, creating one of the world's largest timberland and forest products companies, with the combined entity continuing under the Weyerhaeuser name.
